title: Audit active agent roster and reinstate Kwame

log.context: Audit active agent roster and reinstate Kwame

`architect.md` was never removed from the git history — it remained tracked in `active/` all along. The physical file had simply been moved on disk without a git commit. It's now back in the correct location on disk, matching what git expects.

Here is the current state of both directories:

**`agents/active/`** (7 files):
- `architect.md` (Kwame the Constructor — reinstated)
- `hiring-manager.md`
- `pm.md`
- `spengler.md`
- `the-kid.md`
- `uncle-bob.md`
- `ux.md`

**`agents/fired/`** (2 files):...(truncated)
